name: Sandstorm Gold Ltd.
description: Sandstorm Gold was a gold royalty and streaming company headquartered in Vancouver, British Columbia, with a portfolio of over 250 royalties across mines in the Americas, Africa, Australia, and beyond. The company offered upfront capital to mine operators in exchange for the right to purchase a percentage of production for the life of the mine. Sandstorm Gold was acquired by Royal Gold in October 2025 and is no longer an independent TSX-listed entity.
